stories.title: Data Layer: UserSettings + PreferencesRepository for monthly watch goal
acceptanceCriteria: UserSettings has monthlyWatchGoal: Int field with default 0 (no goal set)
PreferencesRepository has getMonthlyWatchGoal(): Flow<Int> and setMonthlyWatchGoal(goal: Int) suspend methods
PreferencesRepositoryImpl implements both methods using typed DataStore<UserSettings>
Project compiles without errors after changes

stories.title: Domain Layer: UseCases for watch goal (Get/Set) + WatchStats model update
acceptanceCriteria: GetMonthlyWatchGoalUseCase returns Flow<Int> from PreferencesRepository
SetMonthlyWatchGoalUseCase calls PreferencesRepository.setMonthlyWatchGoal()
WatchStats model has monthlyWatchGoal: Int field
GetWatchStatsUseCase combines the watch goal flow (6 flows total) into WatchStats
Project compiles without errors after changes

stories.title: Settings UI: Monthly watch goal setting with NumberPicker dialog
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsFragment has a new 'monthly watch goal' item between stats and clear cache items
Clicking the item shows MaterialAlertDialog with NumberPicker (0-100, 0=no goal)
Current goal value is displayed as subtitle text (e.g., '10편' or '설정 안 됨')
SettingsViewModel has setMonthlyWatchGoal() and monthlyWatchGoal StateFlow
fragment_settings.xml has the new item layout with ic_stats icon
Korean and English strings added for all new UI text
Project compiles without errors

stories.title: Stats UI: Goal progress display with progress bar and percentage
acceptanceCriteria: StatsFragment shows a goal progress card when monthlyWatchGoal > 0
Card contains a MaterialProgressIndicator (linear) showing monthlyWatched / monthlyWatchGoal percentage
Card shows text like '3 / 10편' format
Card is hidden when monthlyWatchGoal is 0 (no goal set)
Goal achieved state shows celebratory text ('목표 달성!')
fragment_stats.xml has the new card between monthly watched and average rating cards
Korean and English strings added
Project compiles without errors

stories.title: Goal Achievement Notification
acceptanceCriteria: WatchGoalNotificationHelper checks if goal is achieved when watch history is saved
Notification uses a separate channel 'watch_goal_channel'
Notification channel created in MovieFinderApp.onCreate()
Notification only fires once per month (tracked via UserSettings.lastGoalNotifiedMonth)
Notification has congratulatory title/text and deep links to stats screen
Korean and English strings for notification text
Project compiles without errors

stories.title: Unit Tests for watch goal feature
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsViewModelTest: tests for setMonthlyWatchGoal and monthlyWatchGoal flow (4 new tests)
PreferencesRepositoryImplTest: tests for getMonthlyWatchGoal, setMonthlyWatchGoal, lastGoalNotifiedMonth (5 new tests)
All 154 tests pass (was 145, added 9 new)
./gradlew testDebugUnitTest succeeds
